title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Hyundai India
jsonLd.description:
Hyundai India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hyundai India:
Hyundai India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyundai India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
